strategy: Transform generic SaaS template into distinctive premium dark site inspired by landonorris.com. Break monotony with asymmetric layouts, expressive typography, varied section backgrounds, and generous spacing.

changes.description: Add section-specific spacing tokens, serif font import for expressive typography, gradient divider utilities, and ghost number styles. Increase section-padding to generous values (clamp 100-160px).
Make hero more editorial: right-aligned large ghost text, asymmetric layout with text on left 60% and decorative element on right. Add serif italic accent on 'qui'. Increase vertical breathing.

Transform into true bento grid with dramatically varied sizes: 1 hero card (2x2), 2 medium cards, 2 small cards. Add ghost numbers behind each card. Section header with split serif/sans typography. Background #0e1018 for variation.

Asymmetric 2-column layout: left side has big editorial stat highlight (one metric blown up huge), right side has remaining metrics + case studies stacked. Add gradient divider between sections. Background #08080c.
Horizontal timeline with oversized step numbers as ghost elements. Cards connected by gradient line. Middle card elevated with amber accent. Background #0e1018. More generous spacing between cards.
Increase spacing between pricing and FAQ. Add gradient divider. Popular card more visually distinct with glow ring. Background #08080c.
Add editorial left column with large quote/stat while form sits on right. Background #0e1018. Asymmetric 40/60 layout on desktop.
